action_text: Select "Short description" from the filter field selector
rationale: Selecting "Short description" in the filter builder is the first step to define the required condition; the dropdown is already open with this option visible.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-f9d328e8-a" into the Short description column search input
rationale: As an alternate path, the per‑column search row is visible; filtering the "Short description" column directly should immediately narrow the list to matching entries.

action_text: Open the Operator dropdown for the first filter condition
rationale: After choosing the field in the builder, we need to set the operator to “contains”; opening the operator dropdown enables selecting the correct operator.

action_text: Enter "#SERIES-f9d328e8-a" into the filter value field
rationale: We must specify the filter value; entering the target text into the value input completes the condition so it can be run.

action_text: Open the "Short description" column options menu
rationale: Another route is via the column’s options; opening the “Short description” header menu may offer filtering actions to target matching text.
